updates.total_target: 分析Netflix (NASDAQ: NFLX) 从2019年至2024年平均每付费用户收入（ARPPU）的变化趋势。
updates.deadline: 尽快完成，具体时限由后续阶段细化。

boundaries.scope: 专注于Netflix (NASDAQ: NFLX) 的ARPPU数据，时间范围为2019年至2024年。
constraints: 数据来源必须可靠，优先使用Netflix官方财报、SEC文件或权威金融数据提供商。
分析需涵盖指定时间段内ARPPU的关键变化点、增长/下降趋势及其潜在驱动因素。
不得进行超出2024年的预测或数据分析。

boundaries.scope: 专注于Netflix (NASDAQ: NFLX) 的ARPPU数据，时间范围为2019年至2024年。
constraints: 数据来源必须可靠，优先使用Netflix官方财报、SEC文件或权威金融数据提供商。
分析需涵盖指定时间段内ARPPU的关键变化点、增长/下降趋势及其潜在驱动因素。
不得进行超出2024年的预测或数据分析。

agent_trace.summary: [已完成] 万户级计划已制定，1:10分解口径已建立

tumen_quota.task_objective: 全面分析Netflix (NASDAQ: NFLX) 从2019年至2024年每付费用户平均收入（ARPPU）的变化趋势。
quota_scope: 数据收集：获取Netflix 2019-2024年各季度/年度的营收数据及付费用户数。
数据处理与计算：基于收集数据，计算各期ARPPU。
趋势分析：识别ARPPU变化的关键趋势、驱动因素及潜在影响。
报告产出：提交一份包含数据、图表、趋势分析及关键洞察的综合报告。
tumen_quota.resource_allocation: 调动必要的信息收集、数据分析及报告撰写资源。

decomposition_rule.tumen_to_mingghan: 将万户级任务按功能模块（如数据收集、数据处理、趋势分析、报告撰写）或时间段（如按年份划分数据收集）分解为10个千户级子任务。
decomposition_rule.mingghan_to_jagun: 将千户级子任务进一步按更细粒度的功能（如特定数据点收集、特定计算步骤）或更短时间段（如按季度划分数据）分解为10个百户级子任务。
decomposition_rule.jagun_to_arban: 将百户级子任务按最小可执行单元（如单个数据点核查、特定图表制作）分解为10个十户级子任务。
decomposition_rule.principle: 确保每级分解后，所有子任务之和完整覆盖上级任务，无遗漏或重复。

reporting_cycle.tumen_level: 最终综合报告，在征调令发布后14个自然日内提交。
reporting_cycle.mingghan_level: 每周提交一次进度报告，说明负责子任务的完成情况、遇到的问题及下一步计划。
reporting_cycle.jagun_level: 每3天提交一次状态更新，汇报具体数据点或分析模块的进展。
reporting_cycle.arban_level: 每日完成微任务后立即上报。

mingghan_allocations.title: Collect Netflix Q1-Q4 2019 Financial Data
mingghan_allocations.description: Gather all available financial data for Netflix for the year 2019, specifically focusing on total revenue and total paying subscribers.

mingghan_allocations.title: Collect Netflix Q1-Q4 2020 Financial Data
mingghan_allocations.description: Gather all available financial data for Netflix for the year 2020, specifically focusing on total revenue and total paying subscribers.

mingghan_allocations.title: Collect Netflix Q1-Q4 2021 Financial Data
mingghan_allocations.description: Gather all available financial data for Netflix for the year 2021, specifically focusing on total revenue and total paying subscribers.

mingghan_allocations.title: Collect Netflix Q1-Q4 2022 Financial Data
mingghan_allocations.description: Gather all available financial data for Netflix for the year 2022, specifically focusing on total revenue and total paying subscribers.

mingghan_allocations.title: Collect Netflix Q1-Q4 2023 Financial Data
mingghan_allocations.description: Gather all available financial data for Netflix for the year 2023, specifically focusing on total revenue and total paying subscribers.

mingghan_allocations.title: Collect Netflix Q1-Q4 2024 Financial Data
mingghan_allocations.description: Gather all available financial data for Netflix for the year 2024, specifically focusing on total revenue and total paying subscribers, including any available projections or preliminary reports.

mingghan_allocations.title: Consolidate and Validate 2019-2021 ARPPU Data
mingghan_allocations.description: Compile the collected revenue and subscriber data for 2019, 2020, and 2021. Calculate or verify the Average Revenue Per Paying User (ARPPU) for each of these years.

mingghan_allocations.title: Consolidate and Validate 2022-2024 ARPPU Data
mingghan_allocations.description: Compile the collected revenue and subscriber data for 2022, 2023, and 2024. Calculate or verify the Average Revenue Per Paying User (ARPPU) for each of these years.

mingghan_allocations.title: Analyze Netflix ARPPU Trends (2019-2021)
mingghan_allocations.description: Analyze the calculated ARPPU data for 2019-2021 to identify trends, significant changes, and potential drivers behind these changes.

mingghan_allocations.title: Analyze Netflix ARPPU Trends (2022-2024 & Overall)
mingghan_allocations.description: Analyze the calculated ARPPU data for 2022-2024 to identify trends, significant changes, and potential drivers. Summarize the overall ARPPU trend for Netflix from 2019 to 2024.

jaghun_allocations.description: Identify and bookmark the official Netflix investor relations page and locate archives for annual reports (10-K filings).
Download or access Netflix's Annual Reports (10-K filings) for fiscal years 2019 and 2020.
Download or access Netflix's Annual Reports (10-K filings) for fiscal years 2021 and 2022.
Download or access Netflix's Annual Report (10-K filing) for fiscal year 2023.
Search for and collect Netflix's Q4 2023 and any available Q1-Q3 2024 earnings releases/transcripts to cover the latest data.
Extract annual total revenue and global paying subscribers for 2019 and 2020 from the collected reports.
Extract annual total revenue and global paying subscribers for 2021 and 2022 from the collected reports.
Extract annual total revenue and global paying subscribers for 2023 from the collected reports.
Extract available total revenue and global paying subscribers for 2024 from the collected earnings releases.
Consolidate all extracted annual revenue and subscriber data into a structured format (e.g., a table, CSV, or JSON) for subsequent ARPPU calculation.

arban_allocations.title: Identify Official Netflix Investor Relations Documents (2019-2024)
arban_allocations.description: Research and list all official Netflix investor relations documents (e.g., 10-K filings, earnings reports, shareholder letters) for the fiscal years 2019 through 2024, providing URLs or file paths.

arban_allocations.title: Extract Netflix ARPPU Data for 2019
arban_allocations.description: Locate and extract Netflix's Average Revenue Per Paying User (ARPPU) data for the year 2019 from the identified official sources.

arban_allocations.title: Extract Netflix ARPPU Data for 2020
arban_allocations.description: Locate and extract Netflix's ARPPU data for the year 2020 from the identified official sources.

arban_allocations.title: Extract Netflix ARPPU Data for 2021

arban_allocations.title: Extract Netflix ARPPU Data for 2024 (Projections/Partial)
arban_allocations.description: Locate and extract Netflix's ARPPU data for the year 2024 from the identified official sources, specifically noting if the data is partial, projected, or preliminary.

arban_allocations.title: Research Third-Party Financial Analyses of Netflix ARPPU (2019-2024)
arban_allocations.description: Conduct web searches for reputable financial news, analyst reports, or academic studies that analyze Netflix's ARPPU trends from 2019-2024, providing summaries and source links.

arban_allocations.title: Cross-Verify Official and Third-Party ARPPU Data
arban_allocations.description: Compare and cross-reference the extracted official ARPPU data with insights and figures from third-party analyses, noting any discrepancies, confirmations, or additional contextual information.

arban_allocations.title: Synthesize Netflix ARPPU Trend (2019-2024)
arban_allocations.description: Synthesize all collected official and third-party data to identify the overall trend and specific changes in Netflix's ARPPU from 2019 to 2024, preparing a concise summary of findings.
